Scump.note: Counted here as 28 major wins, following the CoD Esports Wiki's Major/Premier classification. Some trackers (e.g. breakingpoint, Dexerto) list 30 by including sub-major or legacy events the wiki treats as minors; the exact events differ by source and often aren't itemized, so this site defers to the wiki's classification rather than hand-picking tournaments.
